text: The extreme low quality of this movie works eerily well.  It's less of a Mario video and more of a fever dream, which is pretty much what CDi was: a half-assed, cheap console which shouldn't have existed.  The CDi had a stable of really bizarre games like The Flowers of Robert Mapplethorpe and the Nintendo-licensed Mario and Zelda games are so bad that the CDi goes from "another bad console" to "am I having a pizza dream?"  The dialogue sounds like Dadaist poetry: "ALL TOASTERS TOAST TOAST!"
